## Roadmap Checklist

## Compliance Checks

- [ ] No paid GCP services were created, configured, deployed, or called
- [ ] Firebase scope stayed repo-only or manual-only
- [ ] Any non-Firebase GCP action is tracked in `agape-sovereign: GCP change request (approval required)`
- [ ] Rules / workflow changes were validated locally or the reason for skipping is documented
